creator: hans@nordhaug.priv.no
text:
Hi Frederic,

the package maintainer for Piwik is notorious for repacking releases.
This time not a single file changed; I compared my originally
downloaded distfile with the current version on http://builds.piwik.org/
He doesn't seem to understand that these things matter. Anyway, here
is the diff between the old and new distinfo:

--- distinfo.old        2013-01-16 10:10:18.000000000 +0100
+++ distinfo    2013-01-16 10:10:40.000000000 +0100
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (piwik-1.10.tar.gz) = cd3dbd9072232bea86ae91f5e4930be1c0f49a4aa161646dd6587252c4ec8724
-SIZE (piwik-1.10.tar.gz) = 5805995
+SHA256 (piwik-1.10.tar.gz) = 072463acfb9fe8fb20ee7d296d24e218703e40401ef4f881a75c4a1f53ecafef
+SIZE (piwik-1.10.tar.gz) = 5806842

I know you can generate this yourself.

Regards,
Hans
